name: dry-run: `append-failure-log` with --dry-run produces no filesystem writes
command: stat -f '%m' . > before.txt 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/append-failure-log.sh" --file FAILURE-LOG.md --date 2026-05-04 --summary x --dry-run >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ ! -e FAILURE-LOG.md ] && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > tree/a.yaml

printf 'src-1:
  publisher: A
  url: https://a.com
  license: CC-BY-4.0
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
